meta_title: For Students: SaaS starter kit to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: SaaS Starter Kit to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with no portfolio. Master your first SaaS project using this expert-led starter kit guide featuring Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: To overcome the 'no portfolio' trap, stop building tutorials and start shipping a SaaS starter kit. By leveraging AI-assisted coding tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you can scaffold production-ready authentication, database schemas, and billing flows in hours, transforming your GitHub from empty repositories into a high-value, professional SaaS showcase.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the ultimate enemy of the aspiring developer. You have the theoretical knowledge, but your repository remains empty, a silent testament to tutorials finished but never applied. The industry doesn't care about your certificates; it cares about the shipping velocity and the architecture of the systems you've actually deployed.

This is where the SaaS starter kit changes the game. Instead of building from scratch, you'll master the art of architectural scaffolding. By combining Antigravity's rapid generation capabilities with Claude Code's deep reasoning, you aren't just writing code—you are building a scalable foundation that proves your worth to future employers and clients.

steps.title: Define the SaaS Architecture
steps.description: Establish a robust foundation using a modern stack like Next.js, Supabase, and Tailwind. We focus on separation of concerns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a production-ready Next.js 14 project with Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, and Supabase integration, focusing on a clean folder structure for scalability.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Initialize project structure with standard SaaS boilerplate patterns'.

steps.title: Implement Role-Based Authentication
steps.description: Secure your app immediately. A SaaS is only as good as its user management system.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a secure authentication flow using Supabase Auth, including sign-up, login, and protected server-side routes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Implement Next.js middleware for route protection and session management'.

steps.title: Integrate Stripe Billing Flows
steps.description: Monetization is the core of SaaS. Show you can handle complex webhooks and checkout sessions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Stripe checkout integration for monthly subscription tiers, including webhook handlers for subscription lifecycle events.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Add Stripe billing routes and handle subscription logic in the database'.

steps.title: Build Data-Driven Dashboards
steps.description: Move beyond static pages. Create a dashboard that visualizes user-specific data from your database.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a responsive dashboard layout that fetches and displays user-specific data from a Supabase table with loading states.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Build a data-fetching hook for user dashboard metrics'.

steps.title: Deployment and Observability
steps.description: Ship it. A project isn't real until it is live on Vercel with error logging configured.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure CI/CD pipelines and integrate Sentry for real-time error tracking within the SaaS starter kit.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Configure Vercel deployment settings and Sentry integration'.

pro_tips: Always build your database schema first; your UI is merely a reflection of your data model.
Use mock data early to decouple your UI development from complex backend API implementations.
Prioritize 'Ship-Ready' code over 'Perfect' code; employers value the ability to deploy features over perfection.
Write tests for your critical path (auth/billing) early; it proves you understand professional engineering standards.
Document your architectural decisions in a README.md; it shows you can communicate technical value to stakeholders.
content.next_steps: Once your starter kit is deployed, add one unique feature that solves a specific niche problem, update your documentation, and add the live project URL to your LinkedIn profile.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect moment. Your portfolio is a living document, and your first production-ready SaaS is the most powerful credential you can own. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
